

<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>三清.玄之子 · Lightworkers Taoson</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@300;400;600&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --cream:   #f9f5ee;
      --warm:    #ece0cb;
      --sand:    #c9b89a;
      --umber:   #8b6f47;
      --ink:     #2e1f0f;
      --red:     #9e2a2a;
      --gold:    #c4933a;
    }

    html, body {
      min-height: 100%;
      background: var(--cream);
      font-family: 'Noto Serif TC', serif;
      color: var(--ink);
    }

    .page {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 52px 24px 80px;
    }

    /* Logo */
    .logo-wrap {
      width: 120px;
      height: 120px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--sand);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(139,111,71,0.15);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease both;
      background: #fff;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .logo-wrap img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .name-zh {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease 0.1s both;
    }
    .name-en {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-style: italic;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--umber);
      margin-top: 4px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease 0.2s both;
    }
    .tagline {
      margin-top: 10px;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      color: var(--sand);
      text-align: center;
      animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease 0.3s both;
    }

    /* Divider */
    .divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 360px;
      margin: 32px 0 24px;
      animation: fadeDown 0.9s ease 0.4s both;
    }
    .divider::before, .divider::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      height: 1px;
    }
    .divider::before { background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--sand)); }
    .divider::after  { background: linear-gradient(to left,  transparent, var(--sand)); }
    .divider-glyph { color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.85rem; }

    /* Links */
    .links {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 11px;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 360px;
    }

    .link-card {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 13px;
      padding: 13px 18px;
      background: rgba(255,252,246,0.8);
      border: 1px solid var(--warm);
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--ink);
      transition: all 0.22s ease;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease both;
    }
    .link-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
      width: 3px;
      border-radius: 10px 0 0 10px;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.22s ease;
    }
    .link-card:hover {
      background: rgba(232,224,210,0.9);
      border-color: var(--sand);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(139,111,71,0.12);
    }
    .link-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

    /* accent line colors per platform */
    .lc-form::before    { background: var(--red); }
    .lc-web::before     { background: var(--gold); }
    .lc-ig::before      { background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #f09433, #e6683c, #dc2743, #cc2366, #bc1888); }
    .lc-threads::before { background: #1a1a1a; }
    .lc-fb::before      { background: #1877f2; }
    .lc-yt::before      { background: #ff0000; }
    .lc-tt::before      { background: #010101; }

    .link-icon {
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .ic-form    { background: rgba(158,42,42,0.1);  color: var(--red); }
    .ic-web     { background: rgba(196,147,58,0.1); color: var(--gold); }
    .ic-ig      { background: rgba(220,80,80,0.1);  color: #c8402a; }
    .ic-threads { background: rgba(30,30,30,0.08);  color: #1a1a1a; }
    .ic-fb      { background: rgba(24,119,242,0.1); color: #1877f2; }
    .ic-yt      { background: rgba(200,40,40,0.1);  color: #cc0000; }
    .ic-tt      { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06);     color: #1a1a1a; }

    .link-text { flex: 1; }
    .link-label-zh { font-size: 0.87rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .link-label-en { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--umber); }

    .link-arrow { color: var(--sand); font-size: 0.8rem; transition: transform 0.2s, color 0.2s; }
    .link-card:hover .link-arrow { transform: translateX(3px); color: var(--gold); }

    /* animation delays */
    .links .link-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.7s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.8s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.9s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 1.0s; }
    .links .link-card:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 1.1s; }

    /* Footer */
    .footer {
      margin-top: 48px;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--sand);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      line-height: 2;
      animation: fadeUp 1s ease 1.1s both;
    }

    @keyframes fadeDown {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">

  <div class="logo-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="三清玄之子 Logo" />
  </div>

  <div class="name-zh">三清玄之子</div>
  <div class="name-en">Lightworkers Taoson</div>
  <p class="tagline">以道之名 · 修己以濟人 · 溫哥華道家身心靈中心</p>

  <div class="divider"><span class="divider-glyph">✦</span></div>

  <div class="links">

    <a class="link-card lc-web" href="https://taosonspritualandwellnesscentr.godaddysites.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-web">🌐</div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">官方網站</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">Official Website</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-ig" href="https://www.instagram.com/lightworkerstaoson" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-ig">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">Instagram</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">@lightworkerstaoson</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-threads" href="https://www.threads.com/@lightworkerstaoson" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-threads">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 192 192" fill="currentColor"><path d="M141.537 88.9883C140.71 88.5919 139.87 88.2104 139.019 87.8451C137.537 60.5172 122.616 44.905 97.5542 44.7586C97.4588 44.7586 97.3638 44.7586 97.2676 44.7586C82.2853 44.7586 69.6521 51.1716 61.7361 62.5599L77.5755 73.3806C83.4818 65.0928 92.5429 63.1456 97.2781 63.1456C97.355 63.1456 97.4319 63.1456 97.5081 63.1461C103.975 63.1839 108.861 65.087 112.04 68.8478C114.359 71.5877 115.896 75.3461 116.637 80.0808C111.119 79.2154 105.169 78.9459 98.8261 79.2889C74.4289 80.6418 58.8485 95.4388 59.9695 115.542C60.537 125.723 65.5745 134.451 73.7871 140.158C80.7478 145.041 89.6702 147.424 98.9373 146.97C111.163 146.366 120.638 141.917 127.164 133.751C132.095 127.531 135.267 119.528 136.737 109.542C143.04 113.38 147.68 118.569 149.894 125.011C153.753 136.295 153.938 155.02 141.177 167.647C130.158 178.548 117.074 183.319 97.2689 183.459C75.6399 183.322 59.4668 176.576 49.2628 163.387C39.6811 150.967 34.7291 132.485 34.5444 108.456C34.7291 84.4274 39.6811 65.9457 49.2628 53.5258C59.4668 40.3367 75.6399 33.5915 97.2689 33.4544C118.942 33.5925 135.358 40.3673 145.801 53.5958C150.852 59.9969 154.703 68.0921 157.261 77.7979L174.135 73.7128C171.045 62.3295 166.139 52.5065 159.424 44.3705C146.12 28.0424 126.919 19.6218 97.3194 19.4547C67.6799 19.6237 48.3979 28.0836 34.826 44.5004C22.5888 59.4242 16.3384 80.8882 16.1121 108.436L16.1121 108.456L16.1121 108.476C16.3384 136.024 22.5888 157.488 34.826 172.412C48.3979 188.828 67.6799 197.288 97.3194 197.457C124.39 197.297 141.876 190.316 157.174 175.141C175.399 157.032 174.875 133.698 169.146 120.783C164.994 111.61 156.654 103.904 141.537 88.9883ZM98.4405 128.582C88.0005 129.613 77.3975 124.75 76.8522 115.333C76.4591 108.503 82.0018 100.678 99.1887 99.7174C101.086 99.6101 102.976 99.5562 104.839 99.5562C110.887 99.5562 116.564 100.166 121.792 101.323C119.682 123.105 108.891 127.557 98.4405 128.582Z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">Threads</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">@lightworkerstaoson</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-fb" href="https://www.facebook.com/share/1DPXLdhEW6/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-fb">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18 2h-3a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v3H7v4h3v8h4v-8h3l1-4h-4V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">Facebook</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">Lightworkers Taoson</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-yt" href="https://youtube.com/@lightworkerstaoson" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-yt">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M22.54 6.42a2.78 2.78 0 0 0-1.95-1.96C18.88 4 12 4 12 4s-6.88 0-8.59.46A2.78 2.78 0 0 0 1.46 6.42 29 29 0 0 0 1 12a29 29 0 0 0 .46 5.58 2.78 2.78 0 0 0 1.95 1.96C5.12 20 12 20 12 20s6.88 0 8.59-.46a2.78 2.78 0 0 0 1.95-1.96A29 29 0 0 0 23 12a29 29 0 0 0-.46-5.58z"/><polygon fill="white" points="9.75 15.02 15.5 12 9.75 8.98 9.75 15.02"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">YouTube</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">@lightworkerstaoson</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-tt" href="https://www.tiktok.com/@lightworkers.taoson" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-tt">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 0 1-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 0 1 2.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.33 6.33 0 0 0-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 0 0-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.33-6.34V8.69a8.18 8.18 0 0 0 4.78 1.52V6.76a4.85 4.85 0 0 1-1.01-.07z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">TikTok</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">@lightworkers.taoson</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

    <a class="link-card lc-form" href="https://forms.gle/4vZNxtyM7ZMNemUR6" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <div class="link-icon ic-form">📋</div>
      <div class="link-text">
        <div class="link-label-zh">功德法會專場報名</div>
        <div class="link-label-en">Merit Ceremony Registration</div>
      </div>
      <span class="link-arrow">›</span>
    </a>

  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <div>三清玄之子 · Lightworkers Taoson</div>
    <div>Vancouver · @lightworkerstaoson</div>
  </div>

</div>
</body>
</html>
